case-shell.title: Case-Shell
case-shell.description: Investigate technical incidents within a virtual environment, explore files, use the terminal, and solve the case as if you were inside the system. We cooked up such a great shit that we came in fourth place at the hackathon.

collections-dev.title: Collections for Developers
collections-dev.description: Personal blog where I share projects, information, resources and more related to web development and programming. Do not search more, this is the place.

good-life-insurance.description: Good Life Insurance is a small company that provides insurance services.
good-life-insurance.problem: The company did not have an online presence (only in Instagram) and the onboarding process for new customers was slow and inefficient (through email and phone calls), which made the process of acquiring new clients difficult and time-consuming for customers and the company.
good-life-insurance.solution: I developed a website for the company, with all the information aboutthe services they offer, and a contact form for new clients to easily get in touch
good-life-insurance.results:
- Company has now a professional website.
- The onboarding process is now automated.
